title: Panda Express Bro pick
html: Stub. Brotein's canonical demo food — Black Pepper Sirloin Steak from Panda Express, scored "MOST ANABOLIC" (33g protein / 275 cal / 8/10 P/C). Used in both the simulator demo card and the App Store screenshot set.
